overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a stormy coastal area at night. The character walks along grassy cliffs and a beach near a massive wooden shipwreck with a red dragon figurehead, approaching a stone bridge under dramatic dark clouds.

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy hillside near a massive shipwreck, surveying the stormy surroundings

entered.detail: large wooden shipwreck with red painted dragon head prow
decayed wooden hull of a longship resting on the rocks
jagged rock formation along the path edge
dark turbulent storm cloud cover covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night with the character walking along a grassy coastal cliff. A massive wooden shipwreck with a distinctive red dragon head prow dominates the view ahead, while jagged rocks line the right side of the path. The sky is filled with dramatic dark clouds, and the area is dimly lit by moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipwreck debris field on gravel shore

events.description: descending into darker shadow area near the shipwreck hull reduces ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking downhill alongside the shipwreck remains toward a darker shoreline area

entered.detail: close-up view of the weathered wooden ship hull with moss and decay
shallow dark water along the gravel shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the cliff to a darker gravel shore area alongside the shipwreck hull. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the elevation drops. The dragon head prow is now behind and out of sight, while the massive hull looms closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with distant stone bridge

events.description: emerging from shipwreck area onto open grassland path with improved visibility

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path through grassy plains toward a distant stone bridge

entered.detail: long stone bridge with multiple arches spanning across the landscape
large moss-covered rock formation beside the trail
weathered wooden posts lining the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shipwreck behind, the scene opens into wide grasslands with a dirt trail leading forward. A large stone bridge becomes visible in the distance to the left, while rocky outcrops dot the right side. The sky remains stormy but the area feels more open and exposed.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach shoreline with shipwreck debris

events.description: reaching the shoreline with visible water and transitioning to sandy beach
approaching wooden pier structure and stone bridge supports along the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach near the water's edge, passing scattered shipwreck debris

entered.detail: dark choppy water lapping against the sandy shore
scattered wooden planks and white cross-shaped debris on the sand
wooden support beams and framework of the bridge extending over water

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character reaching the sandy beach shoreline with dark water visible to the right. Shipwreck debris is scattered along the beach, and the stone bridge is now much closer on the left. The character walks along the water's edge toward the bridge structure as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy coastal cliffside down to a debris-strewn beach leading toward a stone bridge. It begins with the character walking along a grassy cliff under a moonlit, cloudy sky, moving toward a massive wooden shipwreck with a red dragon prow. As the character descends to a darker gravel shore, the lighting shifts into deep shadows and the massive hull of the ship looms closer on the right. The scene then opens into wide, exposed grasslands with a dirt trail, where the view expands to reveal a distant stone bridge and rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a sandy shoreline scattered with shipwreck debris, moving along the edge of the dark water toward the bridge structure.
